'''鈭歾h-j-zh''' ('''zhajazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rudiment|rudiment]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rudiment|rudiment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-j-zh
|-
! Lemma
| zhajazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhajazhithi|zhajazhithi]] || [[word:zhajazhiji|zhajazhiji]] || [[word:zhajazhishi|zhajazhishi]] || [[word:zhajazhi|zhajazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajazhuthuth|zhajazhuthuth]] || [[word:zhajazhujuj|zhajazhujuj]] || [[word:zhajazhushush|zhajazhushush]] || [[word:zhajazh|zhajazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajazhuthu|zhajazhuthu]] || [[word:zhajazhuju|zhajazhuju]] || [[word:zhajazhushu|zhajazhushu]] || [[word:zhajazhu|zhajazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajazhufuth|zhajazhufuth]] || [[word:zhajazhufuj|zhajazhufuj]] || [[word:zhajazhufush|zhajazhufush]] || [[word:zhajazhuf|zhajazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhajazhethe|zhajazhethe]] || [[word:zhajazheje|zhajazheje]] || [[word:zhajazheshe|zhajazheshe]] || [[word:zhajazhe|zhajazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajazhothoth|zhajazhothoth]] || [[word:zhajazhojoj|zhajazhojoj]] || [[word:zhajazhoshosh|zhajazhoshosh]] || [[word:zhajazh|zhajazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajazhotho|zhajazhotho]] || [[word:zhajazhojo|zhajazhojo]] || [[word:zhajazhosho|zhajazhosho]] || [[word:zhajazho|zhajazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajazhofoth|zhajazhofoth]] || [[word:zhajazhofoj|zhajazhofoj]] || [[word:zhajazhofosh|zhajazhofosh]] || [[word:zhajazhof|zhajazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhajazh忙th忙|zhajazh忙th忙]] || [[word:zhajazh忙j忙|zhajazh忙j忙]] || [[word:zhajazh忙sh忙|zhajazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhajazh忙|zhajazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajazhathath|zhajazhathath]] || [[word:zhajazhajaj|zhajazhajaj]] || [[word:zhajazhashash|zhajazhashash]] || [[word:zhajazh|zhajazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajazhatha|zhajazhatha]] || [[word:zhajazhaja|zhajazhaja]] || [[word:zhajazhasha|zhajazhasha]] || [[word:zhajazha|zhajazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajazhafath|zhajazhafath]] || [[word:zhajazhafaj|zhajazhafaj]] || [[word:zhajazhafash|zhajazhafash]] || [[word:zhajazhaf|zhajazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhajazhasha|zhajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhajazhasha|gozhajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhajazhasha|gokizhajazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhajazhn眉sha|zhajazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkn眉sha|gozhajazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhajazhn眉sha|gokizhajazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhajazhsh毛sha|zhajazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhajazhnksh毛sha|gozhajazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhajazhsh毛sha|gokizhajazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhajazhrosha|zhajazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkrosha|gozhajazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhajazhrosha|gokizhajazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajazhmusha|zhajazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkmusha|gozhajazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhajazhmusha|gokizhajazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhajazhsherasha|zhajazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhajazhnksherasha|gozhajazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhajazhsherasha|gokizhajazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhajazhngasha|zhajazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkngasha|gozhajazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhajazhngasha|gokizhajazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhajazhyasha|zhajazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkyasha|gozhajazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhajazhyasha|gokizhajazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhajazhyamasha|zhajazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkyamasha|gozhajazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhajazhyamasha|gokizhajazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhajazhn眉sh毛sha|zhajazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhajazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhajazhn眉sh毛sha|gokizhajazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhajazhn眉rosha|zhajazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkn眉rosha|gozhajazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhajazhn眉rosha|gokizhajazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajazhn眉musha|zhajazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkn眉musha|gozhajazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhajazhn眉musha|gokizhajazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhajazhsh毛n眉sha|zhajazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhajazhnksh毛n眉sha|gozhajazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhajazhsh毛n眉sha|gokizhajazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhajazhsh毛rosha|zhajazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhajazhnksh毛rosha|gozhajazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhajazhsh毛rosha|gokizhajazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajazhsh毛musha|zhajazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhajazhnksh毛musha|gozhajazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhajazhsh毛musha|gokizhajazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhajazhron眉sha|zhajazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkron眉sha|gozhajazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhajazhron眉sha|gokizhajazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhajazhrosh毛sha|zhajazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkrosh毛sha|gozhajazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhajazhrosh毛sha|gokizhajazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhajazhromusha|zhajazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkromusha|gozhajazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhajazhromusha|gokizhajazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhajazhmun眉sha|zhajazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkmun眉sha|gozhajazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhajazhmun眉sha|gokizhajazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhajazhmush毛sha|zhajazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkmush毛sha|gozhajazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhajazhmush毛sha|gokizhajazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhajazhmurosha|zhajazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhajazhnkmurosha|gozhajazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhajazhmurosha|gokizhajazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhajazh|zhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙j忙zh|zh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhajazh|hozhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙j忙zh|hozh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhajazh|hohozhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙j忙zh|hohozh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhajazh|n眉zhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙j忙zh|n眉zh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhajazh|n眉n眉zhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙j忙zh|n眉n眉zh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhajazh|n茂zhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙j忙zh|n茂zh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhajazh|n茂n茂zhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙j忙zh|n茂n茂zh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhajazh|luzhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙j忙zh|luzh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhajazh|luluzhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙j忙zh|luluzh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhajazh|lizhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙j忙zh|lizh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhajazh|lilizhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙j忙zh|lilizh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhajazh|kozhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙j忙zh|kozh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhajazh|kokozhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙j忙zh|kokozh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhajazh|kezhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙j忙zh|kezh忙j忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhajazh|kekezhajazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙j忙zh|kekezh忙j忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
